presentation.title: Program Coach Deck 02 — Persona & Opportunity Workshop

slides.title: Building Evidence-Based Personas
slides.body:
A persona is not fiction — it is compressed evidence.

Include: name, segment, problems, goals, fears, financial behaviors.
slides.speakerNotes: Show exemplar persona on screen. 5 min.
discussionQuestions: What evidence do you already have?

slides.title: Market Observation Protocol
slides.body:
Observe in pairs: public spaces, campus, community.
Note exact language people use — not your interpretation.
discussionQuestions: Where will your squad observe today?

slides.title: Persona Presentation Format
slides.body:
Each squad presents: persona, top problem, opportunity hypothesis.
3 minutes present + 2 minutes program coach/mentor feedback.

slides.title: Day 3 Deliverables
slides.body:
✓ Customer persona canvas
✓ Market insight log
✓ Needs analysis survey plan
✓ Portfolio market intelligence update
discussionQuestions: What survey will you launch before Day 4?
